text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rpokala
Date: Fri Dec 11 21:51:00 UTC 2015
New revision: 292123
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/292123

Log:
  [PR 195033] Document mps.enable_ssu

  mps(4) sends StartStopUnit to SATA direct-access devices during shutdown.
  Document the tunables which control that behavior.

  PR:		195033
  Reviewed by:	scottl
  Approved by:	jhb
  MFC after:	2 weeks
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D4456

Changes:
  head/share/man/man4/mps.4
